description: Learn about Binance Quarterly Futures, including settlement methods, delivery times, and fees. Understand how positions are managed at expiration and the implications of settlement prices.
topic_summary: This guide covers five key aspects of Binance Quarterly Futures: the settlement method [t=36:31], delivery timing [t=56:57], settlement price determination [t=81:78], delivery fees [t=112:41], and restrictions on position management before expiration [t=121:85].
